notes_zh:
### 接力模式

- **新增** 接力窗口右边缘也支持拖拽调宽（向右扩展、左边固定），与左边缘镜像；鼠标进入窗口时两侧指示器淡入（28%），靠近边缘或拖拽时变亮（65%）。同时修复了部分情况下左侧指示器一直显示不消失的问题
- **优化** 「全部粘贴」大幅提速：每条之间间隔从 150ms 降到 30ms、单条内部延迟从 100ms 降到 20ms。100 条队列从约 38 秒缩短到约 6 秒
- **优化** 「全部粘贴」完成后的行为更直觉：开启循环则重新从第一条开始；未开启循环则自动退出接力模式
- **修复** 清空接力队列后，重新复制刚刚清掉的最后一条内容时进不了队列的问题

---
notes_en:
### Relay Mode

- **New** Drag the right edge of the relay panel to widen it (anchoring the left side), mirroring the existing left-edge behavior. Indicators on both edges fade in (28%) when the cursor enters the window and brighten (65%) when near the edge or while dragging. Also fixes a case where the left indicator could stay visible
- **Improve** "Paste All" is now much faster: per-item delay reduced from 100ms to 20ms and inter-item gap from 150ms to 30ms — pasting 100 items drops from ~38s to ~6s
- **Improve** Cleaner "Paste All" completion behavior: restart from the first item when loop is enabled; otherwise exit relay mode automatically
- **Fix** After clearing the relay queue, re-copying the just-cleared last item now enters the queue again
